title: MOBILE CLINICS - 211info
text: PORTLAND COMMUNITY COLLEGE SE CAMPUS MOBILE CLINIC MOBILE CLINICS Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides health care services such as care for injuries and illnesses, physical exams, reproductive health exams, vaccines, pregnancy testing, dental check-ups and cleanings, and limited prescrption drugs. 2305 SE 82nd Avenue Portland, OR 97216 Eligibility: Vaccines: Age 18 and older All other services: Unrestricted Hours: First, third, and fifth Wednesdays of the month, summer term only Get Directions Visit Website INTAKE PROCEDURE: Walk in FEES: Varies by service. Services are based on a pay what you can model. Accepts OHP, Medicaid, Medicare, and some private insurance. No one will be turned away for an inability to pay. DOCUMENTS: None AREA SERVED: Multnomah County Services: Mobile Dental Care Mobile Health Care If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. PORTLAND COMMUNITY COLLEGE SE CAMPUS MOBILE CLINIC
